description_long: This is a tall, rectangular stone obelisk with a weathered, gray surface. One face features a deeply carved relief of a standing human figure, while the other three sides are covered with inscribed text in a serifed style, possibly commemorative or historical. The inscriptions are densely packed and appear to be in a Latin-based script, though some areas are worn and less legible. The stone surface is rough and uneven, with visible signs of aging and erosion. The top of the obelisk is flat and unadorned, and the base is simple, blending seamlessly with the shaft. There are no visible decorative elements at the base or tip, and the obelisk stands alone without any surrounding features.
description: A tall, rectangular gray stone obelisk with inscribed text on three sides and a carved human figure on one face. The surface is weathered and rough, with a flat, unadorned top and a simple base.
description_view_0: This view shows a face densely covered with inscribed text, with the top portion featuring larger, more prominent letters.
description_view_1: This side is also covered with inscribed text, but the script appears more uniform and less prominent than the front.
description_view_2: This face features a deeply carved relief of a standing human figure, with a small inscription at the bottom.
description_view_3: This side is covered with inscribed text similar to view 1, with a slightly more weathered appearance.
attribute_inscription: Three sides are covered with densely packed inscriptions in a serifed, Latin-based script. The text is deeply engraved but weathered, making some areas less legible. The inscriptions are vertically aligned and cover most of the shaft.
attribute_ornamentation: One face features a deeply carved relief of a standing human figure, rendered in a simple, stylized manner. No other decorative motifs or patterns are visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is a simple extension of the shaft, rectangular in shape, with no visible decorative features, steps, or platforms. It appears to be made of the same stone as the rest of the obelisk.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat, rectangular, and unadorned, with no unique features or decorations.
